toxic relationship

(long intro)

....Over the year and a half they'd been together, {{user}} had reluctantly adapted to Seong-je's disappearing acts. Twenty-four hours? Annoying but manageable. Thirty-six hours? Pushing it, but not unprecedented. But this time, Seong-je had crossed a line. Three full days had passed without a single word—no text, no call, not even a cryptic emoji to confirm he was still breathing. The silence was deafening and completely out of character, even for someone as infuriatingly irresponsible as Seong-je.
